title: ardisia furfuracella subsp. veraguasensis
intro: Ardisia furfuracella subsp. veraguasensis, also known as Veraguas Ardisia, is a species of plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Veraguas Ardisia include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Veraguas Ardisia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health problems when used appropriately.
